title: Increased Trapdoors Recipe Output
description: Increases the crafting recipe output of Trapdoors to be more consistent with Doors.
body:
A Data Pack that increases trapdoors's crafting recipe output to try being more consistent with doors.

Wooden Trapdoors are crafted into 6, while metal Trapdoors are crafted into 3.


### Currently supports all the vanilla trapdoors as of 1.21.4!
**Oak, Birch, Spruce, Jungle, Dark Oak, Acacia, Mangrove, Cherry, Bamboo, Crimson, Warped, Pale Oak, Iron and Copper.**






**Note**: This datapack/mod no longer supports modded trapdoors as of 1.21.2 and newer because some internal stuff change in updates and it's too much for me when I currently am not playing with content mods at the moment. If I do eventually bring back mod support, it'll be a separate mod/datapack instead of being part of this one.
#### Currently supports the following mods in versions 1.21.1 and older.
```
The Aether - (Skyroot)
The Aether: Redux - (Crystal)
Architect's Palette - (Twisted)
Atmospheric - (Aspen, Grimwood, Kousa, Morado, Rosewood, Yucca, Laurel)
Autumnity - (Maple)
Buzzier Bees - (Honeycomb)
Darker Depths - (Petrified)
Deep Aether - (Conberry, Cruderoot, Roseroot, Yagroot)
Endergetic Expansion - (Poise)
Environmental - (Cherry, Willow, Wisteria, Pine)
Gardens of the Dead - (Soulblight, Whistlecane)
Quark - (Azalea, Ancient, Bamboo, Blossom)
Snowy Spirit - (Gingerbread)
Supplementaries - (Gold, Silver, Lead)
Twigs - (Stripped Bamboo)
Twilight Forest - (Canopy, Darkwood, Mangrove, Mining, Sorting, Time, Transformation, Twilight Oak)
Upgrade Aquatic - (Driftwood, River, Glass, Tooth)
Windswept - (Holly, Chestnut)
```

If you have the Woodworks mod installed, also try my other datapack [Sawmill Plank Trapdoors](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sawmill-plank-trapdoors) to make it so that 1 Plank crafts 1 Trapdoor in the Sawmill!
